# lunar_model

TODO: Write a description here

## Installation

1. Add the dependency to your `shard.yml`:

   ```yaml
   dependencies:
     lunar_model:
       github: your-github-user/lunar_model
   ```

2. Run `shards install`

## Usage

```crystal
require "lunar_model"
```

TODO: Write usage instructions here

TODO: Write development instructions here

## Contributing

1. Fork it (<https://github.com/your-github-user/lunar_model/fork>)
2. Create your feature branch (`git checkout -b my-new-feature`)
3. Commit your changes (`git commit -am 'Add some feature'`)
4. Push to the branch (`git push origin my-new-feature`)
5. Create a new Pull Request

## Contributors

- [LWFlouisa](https://github.com/your-github-user) - creator and maintainer

def.name: first_quarter
def.body:
2.times do
  LunarModel::MachineLearning.hyper_statistics(a1, a2, b1, b2, c1, c2)
  LunarModel::MachineLearning.dynamic_mode_switcher
  current_probability = (File.read("data/statistics/probability/current_probability.txt")).to_f
  current_information = File.read("data/statistics/label/current_information.txt")
  puts("[ #{current_information} ]")
  system("./kosan #{current_probability} 0.8 #{current_probability} 0.2 #{current_probability} 0.2 0.8")
end
"Le phase lunaire es Premier Trimestre."

class_methods.name: lunar_cycle
class_methods.args_string: (current_phase, a1, a2, b1, b2, c1, c2)
class_methods.args_html: (current_phase, a1, a2, b1, b2, c1, c2)

def.name: lunar_cycle
def.body:
lunar_phases = [0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
if current_phase == lunar_phases[0]
  puts(LunarModel::LunarSeason.new_moon(a1, a2, b1, b2, c1, c2))
else
  if current_phase == lunar_phases[1]
    puts(LunarModel::LunarSeason.waxing_crescent(a1, a2, b1, b2, c1, c2))
  else
    if current_phase == lunar_phases[2]
      puts(LunarModel::LunarSeason.first_quarter(a1, a2, b1, b2, c1, c2))
    else
      if current_phase == lunar_phases[3]
        puts(LunarModel::LunarSeason.waxing_gibbous(a1, a2, b1, b2, c1, c2))
      else
        if current_phase == lunar_phases[4]
          puts(LunarModel::LunarSeason.full_moon(a1, a2, b1, b2, c1, c2))
        else
          if current_phase == lunar_phases[5]
            puts(LunarModel::LunarSeason.waning_gibbous(a1, a2, b1, b2, c1, c2))
          else
            if current_phase == lunar_phases[6]
              puts(LunarModel::LunarSeason.last_quarter(a1, a2, b1, b2, c1, c2))
            else
              if current_phase == lunar_phases[7]
                puts(LunarModel::LunarSeason.waning_crescent(a1, a2, b1, b2, c1, c2))
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
    end
  end
end
sleep(1.5)

def.name: dynamic_guillotine_allocation
def.body:
l1_reasses = "level one reasses"
l2_reasses = "level two reasses"
l3_reasses = "level tre reasses"
l4_reasses = "level fro reasses"
reward_model = [[[l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l1_reasses], [l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l2_reasses], [l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l3_reasses], [l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l4_reasses]], [[l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l1_reasses], [l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l2_reasses], [l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l3_reasses], [l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l4_reasses]], [[l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l1_reasses], [l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l2_reasses], [l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l3_reasses], [l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l4_reasses]], [[l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l1_reasses], [l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l2_reasses], [l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l3_reasses], [l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l4_reasses]]]
row_options = [0, 1, 2, 3]
col_options = [0, 1, 2, 3]
arr_options = [0, 1, 2, 3]
cur_row = row_options.sample
cur_col = col_options.sample
cur_arr = arr_options.sample
current_reward_structure = reward_model[cur_row][cur_col][cur_arr]
if current_reward_structure == l1_reasses
  loss
else
  if current_reward_structure == l2_reasses
    2.times do
      loss
    end
  else
    if current_reward_structure == l3_reasses
      3.times do
        loss
      end
    else
      if current_reward_structure == l4_reasses
        4.times do
          loss
        end
      else
        loss
      end
    end
  end
end

def.name: dynamic_mode_switcher
def.body:
modes = [[["deposit", "deposit"], ["deposit", "extract"]], [["extract", "deposit"], ["extract", "extract"]]]
row_options = [0, 1]
col_options = [0, 1]
arr_options = [0, 1]
cur_row = row_options.sample
cur_col = col_options.sample
cur_arr = arr_options.sample
current_mode = modes[cur_row][cur_col][cur_arr]
if current_mode == "deposit"
  dynamic_reward_allocation
else
  if current_mode == "extract"
    dynamic_guillotine_allocation
  else
    dynamic_guillotine_allocation
  end
end

def.name: dynamic_reward_allocation
def.body:
l1_reasses = "level one reasses"
l2_reasses = "level two reasses"
l3_reasses = "level tre reasses"
l4_reasses = "level fro reasses"
reward_model = [[[l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l1_reasses], [l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l2_reasses], [l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l3_reasses], [l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l1_reasses, l4_reasses]], [[l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l1_reasses], [l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l2_reasses], [l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l3_reasses], [l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l2_reasses, l4_reasses]], [[l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l1_reasses], [l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l2_reasses], [l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l3_reasses], [l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l3_reasses, l4_reasses]], [[l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l1_reasses], [l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l2_reasses], [l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l3_reasses], [l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l4_reasses, l4_reasses]]]
row_options = [0, 1, 2, 3]
col_options = [0, 1, 2, 3]
arr_options = [0, 1, 2, 3]
cur_row = row_options.sample
cur_col = col_options.sample
cur_arr = arr_options.sample
current_reward_structure = reward_model[cur_row][cur_col][cur_arr]
if current_reward_structure == l1_reasses
  gain
else
  if current_reward_structure == l2_reasses
    2.times do
      gain
    end
  else
    if current_reward_structure == l3_reasses
      3.times do
        gain
      end
    else
      if current_reward_structure == l4_reasses
        4.times do
          gain
        end
      else
        gain
      end
    end
  end
end

def.name: gain
def.body:
current_probability = (File.read("data/statistics/probability/current_probability.txt")).to_f
current_information = File.read("data/statistics/label/current_information.txt")
if current_probability > 0.999999999999999999
  current_probability = 0.9 / current_probability
end
case current_probability
when 0.003921569000000000..0.287225000000000000
  "I'm confident it is not [ #{current_information} ] because it has #{current_probability}."
when 0.287225000000000001..0.522225000000000000
  "I'm less unconfident it is not [ #{current_information} ] because it has #{current_probability}."
when 0.522225000000000001..0.756112500000000000
  "I'm almost sure it is [ #{current_information} ] because it has #{current_probability}."
when 0.756112500000000001..0.999999999999999999
  "I'm sure it is [ #{current_information} ] because it has #{current_probability}."
else
  "The probability is either to low or to large, so I can't determine exactly."
end
current_probability = current_probability + 0.15
File.write("data/statistics/probability/current_probability.txt", "#{current_probability}")
File.write("data/statistics/label/current_information.txt", current_information)

def.name: generate_bounded_probability
def.body:
assumed_percentage = "0."
alpha = ["c", "d", "e", "f", "g", "a", "b"]
a = alpha.sample
b = alpha.sample
c = alpha.sample
d = alpha.sample
e = alpha.sample
f = alpha.sample
g = alpha.sample
"#{assumed_percentage}#{c}#{d}#{e}#{f}#{g}#{a}#{b}"

def.name: hyper_statistics
def.body:
a = [a1, a2]
b = [b1, b2]
c = [c1, c2]
d = LunarModel::MachineLearning.convert_to_piano_to_percent(generate_bounded_probability)
matrix = [[[[[a[0], c[0]], [a[0], a[0]], [a[0], a[0]]], [[a[0], b[0]], [a[0], a[0]], [b[0], a[0]]], [[a[0], a[0]], [a[0], a[0]], [c[0], a[0]]]], [[[b[0], c[0]], [b[0], b[0]], [a[0], b[0]]], [[b[0], b[0]], [b[0], b[0]], [b[0], b[0]]], [[b[0], a[0]], [b[0], b[0]], [c[0], b[0]]]], [[[c[0], c[0]], [c[0], c[0]], [a[0], c[0]]], [[c[0], b[0]], [c[0], c[0]], [b[0], c[0]]], [[c[0], a[0]], [c[0], c[0]], [c[0], c[0]]]]], [[[[a[1], c[1]], [a[1], a[1]], [a[1], a[1]]], [[a[1], b[1]], [a[1], a[1]], [b[1], a[1]]], [[a[1], a[1]], [a[1], a[1]], [c[1], a[1]]]], [[[b[1], c[1]], [b[1], b[1]], [a[1], b[1]]], [[b[1], b[1]], [b[1], b[1]], [b[1], b[1]]], [[b[1], a[1]], [b[1], b[1]], [c[1], b[1]]]], [[[c[1], c[1]], [c[1], c[1]], [a[1], c[1]]], [[c[1], b[1]], [c[1], c[1]], [b[1], c[1]]], [[c[1], a[1]], [c[1], c[1]], [c[1], c[1]]]]]]
symbols = matrix[0]
descriptions = matrix[1]
row_options = [0, 1, 2]
col_options = [0, 1, 2]
arr_options = [0, 1, 2]
sub_options = [0, 1]
cur_row = row_options.sample
cur_col = col_options.sample
cur_arr = arr_options.sample
cur_sub = sub_options.sample
current_probability = ((0.33 * 0.33) * 0.33) * 0.25
current_label = symbols[cur_row][cur_col][cur_arr][cur_sub]
current_description = descriptions[cur_row][cur_col][cur_arr][cur_sub]
current_information = "'#{current_label}', '#{current_description}'"
File.write("data/statistics/probability/current_probability.txt", "#{current_probability}")
File.write("data/statistics/label/current_information.txt", current_information)

def.name: loss
def.body:
current_probability = (File.read("data/statistics/probability/current_probability.txt")).to_f
current_information = File.read("data/statistics/label/current_information.txt")
if current_probability > 0.999999999999999999
  current_probability = 0.9 / current_probability
end
case current_probability
when 0.003921569000000000..0.287225000000000000
  "I'm confident it is not [ #{current_information} ] because it has #{current_probability}."
when 0.287225000000000001..0.522225000000000000
  "I'm less unconfident it is not [ #{current_information} ] because it has #{current_probability}."
when 0.522225000000000001..0.756112500000000000
  "I'm almost sure it is [ #{current_information} ] because it has #{current_probability}."
when 0.756112500000000001..0.999999999999999999
  "I'm sure it is [ #{current_information} ] because it has #{current_probability}."
else
  "The probability is either to low or to large, so I can't determine exactly."
end
current_probability = current_probability * 0.95
File.write("data/statistics/probability/current_probability.txt", "#{current_probability}")
File.write("data/statistics/label/current_information.txt", current_information)
